/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION ROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/CTORD: DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE VICTIM RESTITUTION IN THIS CASE/PROGPCD:06-06-22/CONTD: PRIMARYCAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU: POSITIVE REPORT,/

/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/INTC/X: DEFENDANT HAS POSITIVE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT & COMPLETED 8 OF 15 PROGRAMS/X: DEFENDANT IS IN COMPLIANCE/CONT/DOPU: POSITIVE REPORT/
/CAL: PRIMARY CRAEGIVER DIVERSION/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION REPORT & HAS PROGRESS WITH LATINO GROUPS/CONT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/

/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/INTC/X: DEFENDANT HAS APOSITIVE REPORT, IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT, & HAS ATTENDED LATINO GROUPS/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OBJECT TO THE MODIFICATION/EMMOD: COURT REPLACES HOME DETENTION TO CURFEW HOURS OF 8PM-6AM, 7 DAYS PER WEEK/X: STAY AWAY ORDERS STAYIN FULL FORCE & EFFECT & MAINTAIN GPS/X: THIS MODIFICATION APPLIES TO ALLCASES IN DEPT 12 ONLY/CONT/DOPU: PTD/

/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/INTC/X: DEFENDANT HAS RECEIVED A POSITIVE PROGRESS REPORT, DEFENDANT HAS ATTENDED 1 OUT OF 15 LATINO GROUP SESSIONS,/PROGPCD:01-10-22/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT,/

/CAL:PCD PROGRESS REPORT/INTC/STWPX/EMMOD:DEFENDANT HAS BEEN GRANTED AN ADDITIONAL 3 HOURS ON WEDNESDAYS AND THURSDAYS TO LEAVE HOME TO DO ERRANDS//EMMOD:DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO GO TO WORK IN UNION CITY, IF SHERIFF DEPT, FINDS THAT THIS IS A LIGITIMATE JOB/X:DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE RESTITUTION ONTHIS CASE/CONTD PCD PROG RPT/PROGPCD:11-29-21/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL:TO SET & JOIN OTHER/X:DA IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/INTC/STIPLD:11-18-21(60)/EMMOD:TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO LEAVE HER HOUSE TO GO TO WORK IN UNION CITY,  THE SHERIFF DEPT, MUST VERIFY SHE IS WORKING,  ALSO THE HOURS  FOR DEFENDANT TO LEAVE HER HOUSE TO GO SHOPPING HAVE BEEN EXTENDED  FROM 2 HOURSTO 3 HOURS ON THURSDAY ONLY/CONTD: TO SET & JOIN OTHER CASES/DOP/

/CAL: STATUS OF RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/EMMOD: DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, DEFENDANT MAY LEAVE RESIDENCE TO ATTEND ALL APPOINTMENTS RELATED TO PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 08-30-21 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 10-18-21(60)/987,2/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACEDON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACEAN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/SA4: TENDERLOIN DISTRICT AREA BOUNDED BY GEARY ST, POWELL ST, MARKET ST, MCALLISTER ST, & VANNESS AVE IN SF/SAORD/CONTD: RELEASE CONDITION STATUS ON 08-20-21/DOP/CONTD: TO SET & JOIN OTHER CASES ON 08-30-21/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITION(S)/MO GRTD/EMTERM/OR/X:06-06-22 DATE IS CONFIRMED,/
